name: The Tee Box - Golf Bar & Restaurant
address: 906 S Kansas Ave Suite 100, Topeka, KS 66612
about: The Tee Box - Golf Bar & Restaurant is a local family-owned facility located in Downtown Topeka on Historic Kansas Avenue. It provides an experience for golfers and foodies alike, equipped with state-of-the-art Trackman golf simulation bays that allow players of any level to golf anywhere, anytime. The venue offers a range of services including a craft kitchen menu, handcrafted cocktails, top-shelf spirits, and event catering. Catering packages are available for various occasions, and the facility also offers mobile golf services and event planning with all-in-one packages designed with budget in mind.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-shelf spirits and craft kitchen menu offerings
Clubs and balls are provided, making it easy for newcomers

food_and_drink.notes: Craft kitchen menu selections are available, featuring items such as The Eagle Flatbread on Gluten Free Crust, BBQ nacho plate, ground beef, chicken, and shrimp tacos.

Handcrafted cocktails, top shelf spirits, and tastings are available. Specific drinks mentioned include Kansas City Vodka, Concord Grape Preserves, Ginger, Lime, Weller Special Reserve, and Woodford Reserve Vern's 4.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Trackman golf simulation bays are installed.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the Tee Box provides clubs and balls for use in their simulation bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The Tee Box offers a full kitchen and bar menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but the Trackman simulators allow for virtual play on numerous courses.

faq.question: Is The Tee Box kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if children are welcome or if there are any kid-specific amenities or activities.
